Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sandvipers]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — The Sandvipers might take their embarrassment out on someone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Sandvipers were at the gate and are allies of Jai Sen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Sandvipers have a corner of the Five Factions Alliance territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Sandvipers are members of the Sandviper sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Sandvipers are a group that Lindon and Yerin encounter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Long melds into the crowd of Sandvipers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — The Sandvipers use captured prisoners to gather scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — The Sandvipers use scripted constructs for mining.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — Sandvipers wear blood-spattered furs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Sandvipers are a group that takes people who cannot repay debts or lose duels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — A Sandviper took Lindon in the middle of the night and brought him away from Fisher territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Sandvipers possess insidious, venomous powers that can dissolve flesh like an acid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Sandviper madra can burn through living flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Sandviper Ruler techniques produce a gas that causes seizures and paralysis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — The Sandvipers are a group that uses specific techniques on prisoner flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Sandviper guards use iron and scripted collars on prisoners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — The Sandvipers have a young chief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Gesha considers the Sandvipers to be cowards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon has been tracking the shift changes of Sandviper guards working with mining teams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Sandvipers keep their scales in a secure location back in their main camp stronghold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Sandvipers are present in the surroundings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — Sandvipers act as escorts for the miners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin fought off three Sandviper soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Sandvipers are a group from which Lindon intended to steal scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Sandvipers are tenacious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Sandvipers taste like chicken livers soaked in acid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — A sandviper is a natural sacred beast with centipede legs and a serpentine head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The sandviper has a tan and bright carapace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The Sandvipers may have found their way through the Ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Sandvipers use the Bloodforged Iron body to combat their own toxins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The Sandvipers are a group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Sandvipers have miniature Remnants attached to their arms.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — The Sandvipers are the veterans of Gokren's sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Scouts from the Sandvipers have spotted Arelius banners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Sandvipers are fur-clad.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — A Sandviper intervened in the battle by using acid-green javelins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Sandvipers are a group that gathered to watch the white spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long has four Sandvipers staying behind to take care of Jai Chen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Sandviper wagon was seen in the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Sandvipers travel on mounts such as Thousand-Mile Clouds or flying constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Sandvipers are associated with Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Sandvipers are fur-clad and seek to capture Remnants for consumption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Sandvipers are waging a guerilla war against the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Sandvipers accompanied Jai Long and Gokren.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Sandvipers were hiding nearby.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
